code:
stateDiagram-v2
    [Logistics_FleetManagement] --> Initializing: Component mounted

    Initializing --> Loading: Subscribe to DMs
    Loading --> Empty: No messages
    Loading --> ThreadList: Messages loaded
    Loading --> Error: Subscription failed

    Empty --> ThreadList: First message received

    ThreadList --> ThreadSelected: User selects thread
    ThreadSelected --> ThreadList: Back to list
    ThreadSelected --> Composing: User types message

    Composing --> Encrypting: User sends
    Encrypting --> Publishing: Encryption complete
    Publishing --> ThreadSelected: Publish success
    Publishing --> Error: Publish failed

    ThreadSelected --> MarkingRead: Auto-mark as read
    MarkingRead --> ThreadSelected: Update complete

    ThreadList --> Refreshing: Pull to refresh
    Refreshing --> ThreadList: Refresh complete

    ThreadSelected --> Deleting: User deletes thread
    Deleting --> ThreadList: Delete complete

    Error --> ThreadList: Retry success
    Error --> [Logistics_FleetManagement]: Fatal error

    note right of Encrypting
        NIP04Service encrypts
        message using recipient's
        public key
    end note

    note right of Publishing
        EventPublisherService
        publishes kind 4 event
        to relays
    end note
compilation_error: [WinError 2] 系统找不到指定的文件。

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为物流车队管理模块设计一个私信状态流转图。核心场景是：组件挂载后开始初始化，然后订阅DMs消息。这里有个关键点——订阅可能失败，得有个Error状态兜底。
明白，Loading之后如果订阅失败进入Error，那成功加载消息呢？是直接进入ThreadList，还是要考虑空消息的情况？
空消息的情况必须考虑，Loading之后要分支：Empty和ThreadList。而且Empty不能死等，得有First message received事件能跳转到ThreadList。
好的，分支结构我记下了。接下来用户交互这块——选中Thread后应该能返回列表，还能进入发消息流程？
对，ThreadSelected要能Back to list。发消息流程要细一点：用户打字是Composing，点击发送先进Encrypting加密，然后Publishing发布。这两个环节都得加注释说明技术实现——加密用NIP04Service，发布用EventPublisherService发kind 4事件。
Encrypting到Publishing是加密完成后流转，Publishing成功回到ThreadSelected。那发布失败呢？
Publishing失败也进Error。另外补充几个交互：ThreadSelected要支持Auto-mark as read，走MarkingRead状态；列表支持Pull to refresh进Refreshing；还要能删除会话，Deleting完成后回ThreadList。
Error状态的处理我再确认下：Retry success能回到ThreadList，但如果是Fatal error就直接退出到Logistics_FleetManagement？
没错，Fatal error直接回到组件外层。所有状态流转都齐了，你整理一下看看有没有遗漏。
检查完毕，从Initializing到Loading的分支，ThreadList和ThreadSelected的双向流转，Composing-Encrypting-Publishing的完整发信链，加上MarkingRead、Refreshing、Deleting三个辅助状态，以及Error的两种出口，结构完整。
